judgment.summary: High-growth business with strong gross margins and cash flow, but trading at a significant valuation premium with negative net profitability.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS 0.25 vs estimate 0.23 (beat) and next earnings date is 2026-07-30.
positives: Free cash flow (TTM) $755.00M — healthy cash generation despite net losses.
negatives: Forward P/E 129.54x — extremely high valuation relative to future earnings.
Profit margin -3.7% — company is currently operating at a net loss.
Price/Sales (TTM) 29.99x — very high premium on revenue.
